title: Version 2.4 — Bulk Processing
summary: **Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter · `.1`–`.3` core path · `.4`–`.6` hardening · `.7`–`.8` integration · `.9` minor freeze / handoff.
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["2.4.x Bulk Processing"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    up["CSV upload in app"] --> mp["s3storage multipart initiate plus parts"]
    mp --> complete["complete plus metadata worker"]
    complete --> job["jobs create DAG node"]
    job --> proc["stream processor finder or verify"]
    proc --> cp["checkpoint byte or row cursor"]
    cp --> out["multipart output to S3"]
    out --> dl["app download via job status"]
    dl --> gate["2.4 release gate"]
